title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - Starting with no WiFi connection
feature: App Settings - General - Account - Account Delete
scenario: Delete account with no WiFi connection, then retry after reconnecting
steps: Observe the popup: 'Unable to perform task...'
Tap 'Later' and verify the popup closes and returns to Device Settings.
Tap Delete icon again, then Confirm.
Tap 'Retry' and verify the same error popup appears.
Tap 'Retry' and observe a spinner appears followed by a confirmation dialog.
Verify the user is logged out and returned to the account screen.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > Account and verify the user is not logged in.
Verify on the cloud side that the account was properly removed.
expected: When WiFi is off, tapping Delete + Confirm shows 'Unable to perform task...' popup. Tapping 'Later' closes popup and returns to Device Settings. Repeating Delete + Confirm then 'Retry' shows the same error. After turning WiFi on and tapping 'Retry', a spinner appears, then a confirmation dialog, user is logged out and returned to the account screen. User is not logged in via Poly Lens Menu > Support > Account, and the account is properly removed on the cloud side.
